prompt.content: Write a letter in the form of a document addressed to the student with the lowest final grade from the attached updated grade book stating they can re-do their lowest scoring assignment marked as an "Assessment" or "Quiz" from the trimester, including a statement of the relevant assignment and its domain, as well as one other assignment from the trimester in the same domain. (Domain examples would include Reading, Writing, Language, Vocab, Grammar, Oral Presentation, Essay). In case of a tie, include all assignments tied for the lowest score.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
The following student has the lowest final grade:
Mason Brown - 66.3%

The lowest scoring quiz/assessment for the above student is:
Figurative Language Quiz - 59%
Argument Writing Diagnostic - 59%

The learning domains for the above assignments are Language and Writing, respectively.
